prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类（含理科）最低位次约5406→6114→5673→8171→5669，波动较大；2024年因新高考首年出现位次后移至8171，2025年迅速回升至5669，近两年呈 回暖态势；2025年基准约5669名；该校在黑龙江省物理类招生计划2021年30人、2022年31人、2023年31人、2024年35人、2025年37人，逐年小幅扩招；2026年（ §7）计划42人，较2025年增加5人（扩招约13.5%），计划增幅明显，竞争有所加剧。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学主榜排名2026年第51名 ，较2025年第56名有所上升，学校综合实力稳步提升；抖音综合热度排名第21位（较热），短视频平台关注度较高；2023年曾有小语种专业位次下降6211的断档 记录，但校线近年已恢复稳定；2026年声誉文件中未见该校明显负面舆情；水产A+、海洋科学A+、生物学A-、食品科学与工程A-，海洋与水产学科全国顶尖，对 相关专业报考有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等工科专业社会热度持续偏高，与该校招生专业高度契合；黑龙江省2026年物理类考 生估算约11.4万人，较2025年11.7万人略有减少，竞争压力小幅缓和。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次5669、2026年扩招约13.5%使竞争加 剧、物理类考生数略降有缓和作用、学校排名上升及抖音热度较高对报考有正向拉动，预计2026年最低位次较2025年小幅后移；预测最低位次约6099名，区间5599–6599名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间5599–6599名以内，建议以二档专业为主力填报、一档王牌专业冲刺、三档专业保底；位次明显优于区间下限（<5599名）可重点冲击海洋科学、计算机类等一档 专业；位次接近区间上限（>6599名）建议以三档专业为主，争取进入该校。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category (including Science) were approximately 5406 → 6114 → 5673 → 8171 → 5669, showing significant fluctuations; in 2024, due to the first year of the new college entrance exam, the ranking shifted back to 8171, but quickly recovered to 5669 in 2025, indicating a warming trend in the past two years; the 2025 baseline is approximately 5669th place; the university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Heilongjiang Province was 30 in 2021, 31 in 2022, 31 in 2023, 35 in 2024, and 37 in 2025, with a gradual small expansion; in 2026 (§7), the plan is 42 students, an increase of 5 from 2025 (an expansion of about 13.5%), with a significant increase in plan, intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university; ranked 51st in the 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Main Ranking, up from 56th in 2025, showing steady improvement in overall strength; ranked 21st in Douyin comprehensive popularity (relatively hot), with high attention on short video platforms; in 2023, there was a record of a ranking drop of 6211 for a minor language major, but the school's admission line has stabilized in recent years; no significant negative public opinion was found in the 2026 reputation documents; Aquaculture A+, Marine Science A+, Biology A-, Food Science and Engineering A-, with marine and fisheries disciplines at the national top, strongly attracting applicants to related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to have high social popularity, which aligns well with the university's enrollment majors; the estimated number of Physics Category candidates in Heilongjiang Province in 2026 is about 114,000, slightly decreasing from 117,000 in 2025, slightly easing competitive pressure.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 5669, the 2026 expansion of about 13.5% intensifying competition, a slight decrease in Physics Category candidates providing some relief, the rise in school ranking, and high Douyin popularity positively driving applications, it is expected that the minimum ranking in 2026 will shift slightly backward compared to 2025; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 6099, with a range of 5599–6599.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Marine Science (with Basic Disciplines Top-Notch Student Training Plan 2.0 Base)
- Computer Science (including Computer Science and Technology, Intelligent Science and Technology, Data Science and Big Data Technology, Cyberspace Security, Software Engineering, and Confidential Technology)
- Electronic Information (including Electronic Information Engineering, Electronic Information Science and Technology, Communication Engineering, Microelectronics Science and Engineering, Integrated Circuit Design and Integrated Systems)
- Atmospheric Science.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Mechanical Design, Manufacturing and Automation
- Acoustics
- Mathematics (including Mathematics and Applied Mathematics, Information and Computing Science)
- Food Science and Engineering (including Food Science and Engineering, Food Nutrition and Health)
- Biological Sciences (including Ecology, Biotechnology, Biological Science)
- Aquaculture (Ministry of Education Outstanding Agricultural and Forestry Talent Education and Training Plan Reform Pilot Major).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Chemistry
- Materials (including Materials Science and Engineering, Polymer Materials and Engineering, New Energy Materials and Devices)
- Earth Information Science and Technology
- Chemical Engineering and Technology
- Exploration Technology and Engineering (Ministry of Education Outstanding Engineer Education and Training Plan Pilot Major)
- Finance (with Chartered Financial Analyst CFA Experimental Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 5599–6599, it is recommended to mainly fill in Tier 2 majors, aim for Tier 1 flagship majors, and use Tier 3 majors as safety; if your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<5599), you can focus on applying for Tier 1 majors such as Marine Science and Computer Science; if your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (>6599), it is recommended to mainly choose Tier 3 majors to secure admission to the university.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category (including Liberal Arts) was approximately 1009 → 1151 → 7239 (gap in 2023) → 1315 → 1102. In 2023, an anomaly occurred due to a gap in minor language majors, but it recovered to normal levels in 2024–2025, with a baseline of about 1102 in 2025. The enrollment plan for this university in Heilongjiang Province for History Category was 9 in 2021, 8 in 2022, 10 in 2023, 10 in 2024, and 8 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 7, a decrease of 1 (12.5% reduction) compared to 2025, slightly intensifying competition due to fewer slots.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: It is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Main Ranking, it ranks 51st, up from 56th in 2025, indicating steady improvement in overall strength. Its comprehensive popularity on Douyin ranks 21st (relatively hot), with high attention on short video platforms. In 2023, there was a record of a 6211-place drop in ranking for minor language majors, but the school's admission line has stabilized in recent years. No significant negative public opinion was found in the 2026 reputation documents. It has A+ in Aquaculture and Marine Science, A- in Biology and Food Science and Engineering, with marine and aquatic disciplines leading nationally, but its liberal arts majors are mainly language and management fields, with low correlation to its advantageous disciplines.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Journalism and Communication majors are socially discouraged, foreign language majors are generally wait-and-see, and accounting/finance/auditing majors are recommended but polarized. In 2026, the estimated number of History Category examinees in Heilongjiang Province is about 53,000, slightly down from 55,000 in 2025, slightly easing competitive pressure.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 1102, a 12.5% reduction in enrollment in 2026 reducing slots, a slight decrease in History Category examinees providing some relief, relatively cold popularity of liberal arts majors, and a positive pull from the university's rising ranking, the minimum ranking in 2026 is expected to move slightly forward compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is about 1049, with a range of 849–1249.

- Accounting (with International Certified Public Accountant ACCA Direction Class)
- Business Administration (Digital Innovation Management).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Journalism and Communication (including Journalism, Network and New Media).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)

- Public Administration.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 849–1249, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit (<849), you can focus on Tier 1 majors like Accounting. If your ranking is near the upper limit (>1249), it is recommended to mainly choose Tier 3 majors to secure admission to this university.
